chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 298 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا قَالَ لَكَ أَخُوكَ وَ قَدْ خَرَجْتَ مِنَ اَلْحَمَّامِ طَابَ حَمَّامُكَ فَقُلْ أَنْعَمَ اَللَّهُ بَالَكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.298 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If your brother says to you after you come out of the bath, 'May your bath be pleasant,' then reply with, 'May Allah (swt) grant you well-being.'"
